items.title: Bubble Founder Shai Eisenman On Winning Across Generations, Gen Alpha And Not Selling

items.title: Remedy Clinical Skincare raises $20M Series A from L Catterton and Norwest Venture Partners
items.summary: Dr. Muneeb Shah's Remedy (TikTok DermDoctor, 16M+ followers) raises $20M Series A led by L Catterton and Norwest. Brand offers clinical skincare at accessible price points ($15-$45), positioning against luxury dermatologist brands. Highlights strong investor conviction in evidence-based, doctor-founded mass-market skincare. Keywords: clinical skincare, dermatologist-founded, TikTok-to-retail, L Catterton, Norwest, bestseller.

items.title: Saie Clean Makeup Education Strategy - The Makeup Class IRL Masterclass expansion 2025-2026
items.summary: Clean makeup brand Saie launches nationwide Makeup Class program in NY, Toronto, and expanding to more cities. Strategy: turn consumers into brand 'superfans' through hands-on education. Product focus: clean, skin-healthy makeup that teaches proper application. Saie sells at Sephora US. Growing trend: experiential marketing for clean beauty in North America.

items.title: Heretic Indie Fragrance Brand - pop culture collabs strategy drives North America growth
items.summary: LA-based indie fragrance brand Heretic uses unexpected pop culture collaborations (bands, subcultures) to differentiate in crowded US fragrance market. Founder Douglas Little targets niche 'B-side' audiences. Indie fragrance growing rapidly in North America: consumers seeking unique, non-mainstream scents. Price: typically $80-$200. Opportunity for indie fragrance entrants vs. legacy houses.

items.title: Gen Alpha Skincare Market: Bubble brand winning across generations
items.summary: Bubble skincare brand founder Shai Eisenman reports Gen Alpha (under 12) is driving skincare interest. Brand positioned as 'skincare for everyone' at accessible price ($13-$22). Multi-generational strategy: same products appeal to teens and adults. Sephora, Walmart and Target distribution. Trend: Gen Alpha driving tween/teen skincare boom in US market.
